title: excoecaria densiflora
intro: Excoecaria densiflora, also known as the "Gutta" tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant's sap and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Excoecaria densiflora include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Excoecaria densiflora is often prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a paste, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
